name: teamwork-skill
description: Claude Code adapter skills for evidence-grounded research, debugging, planning, execution, review, and long-running goals.

interface.shortDescription: Evidence-grounded teamwork for complex Claude Code tasks.
interface.longDescription: Teamwork helps you move complex research and engineering tasks from uncertain questions to verified results. Use it to gather evidence, diagnose failures, plan decisions, execute scoped changes, review work, or keep a long-running goal moving. You choose the scope and authorize changes; Claude Code remains in control of tools and permissions.
defaultPrompt: Research this problem from primary sources and project evidence, then recommend the next safe action.
Execute authorized scope. Plans are optional. Verify changed path or named boundary; review only if requested or risk-gated.
Initialize or refresh Teamwork for one selected repository without changing unrelated user or project configuration.
